scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name webapp
scripts.export:html: mkdir -p export-html/about export-html/training export-html/services export-html/street-miles export-html/shop export-html/contact && curl -s http://localhost:3000/ > export-html/index.html && curl -s http://localhost:3000/about > export-html/about/index.html && curl -s http://localhost:3000/training > export-html/training/index.html && curl -s http://localhost:3000/services > export-html/services/index.html && curl -s http://localhost:3000/street-miles > export-html/street-miles/index.html && curl -s http://localhost:3000/shop > export-html/shop/index.html && curl -s http://localhost:3000/contact > export-html/contact/index.html && cp -R public/static export-html/static
